title: Register a model and attach a promotion gate
description: Concrete steps to log a run, register the artifact with lineage, and bind a gate that blocks regression.
body: Use when wiring a trained model into a registry-backed promotion path. Do not hand-copy weights between environments — that loses lineage and bypasses gates. Actions: log the run with params/metrics/artifacts, register the best version with dataset hash and commit, attach an eval gate that compares to the incumbent on a frozen set, and transition to production only on pass. Validation signals include a registry version with resolvable lineage and a gate log recording the pass/fail decision. Risk boundary: a manual promotion skips every guardrail; if the gate cannot run, deny the transition and escalate to a human reviewer.
